title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Kotak Mahindra Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kotak Mahindra Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank:
Kotak Mahindra Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
